k l m space equals square root of left parenthesis 6 square root of 2 right parenthesis ² plus left parenthesis 6 right parenthesis ² end root end root
space space space space space space equals space square root of 72 plus 36 end root
space space space space space space equals space square root of 108
space space space space space space equals 6 square root of 3
L equals space 90 degree space left parenthesis space k a r e n a space s i k u minus s i k u right parenthesis
